calendar.matters:
MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Mar-09-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Noe Cordoba, T:619256.1973, representative of defendant Unlimited Decking, Inc.;
No other appearance.

RULING: Mr. Cordoba did not contest the tentative ruling nor did he file an opposition to the motion. At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND VICINITY, ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF IRONWORKERS LOCAL 433's MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is Granted. No opposition filed.

The Court signed the proposed order included with the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
